options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: clp
options.description: Allows you to get items from collectopedia entries and adds those locations to the pool

options.name: loc
options.description: Allows you to get items from locations and adds those locations to the pool

options.name: ebk
options.description:
Allows you to get items from completing enemy entries(white dot in the menu)
and adds those locations to the pool

options.name: enemy_book_threshold
options.description:
Sets the required kills to unlock a enemy location. White dot in enemy book appears at 3 for normal enemies.
Uniques are fixed at 1

options.name: amr
options.description: Allows you to receive ground armor as items and adds those items to the pool

options.name: wpn
options.description: Allows you to receive ground weapons as items and adds those items to the pool

options.name: aug
options.description: Allows you to receive ground augments as items and adds those items to the pool

options.name: skwpn
options.description: Allows you to receive skell weapons as items and adds those items to the pool

options.name: skamr
options.description: Allows you to receive skell armor as items and adds those items to the pool

options.name: skaug
options.description: Allows you to receive skell augments as items and adds those items to the pool

options.name: impit
options.description: Allows you to receive important items and adds those items to the pool. Has no logic currently

options.name: enemy_aggro
options.description: Increase or decrease the enemy aggression

options.name: enemy_stats
options.description: Adjust the stats of the enemies

options.name: damage_divisor
options.description: Divide your teams damage output. Note: Displayed damage values stay the same regardless

options.name: damage_multiplicator
options.description: Multiply your teams damage output. Note: Displayed damage values stay the same regardless

options.name: qte_auto
options.description: Automatically completes Quicktime-Events with the specified rating

options.name: qte_speed
options.description: Sets the speed for every Quicktime-Event manually

options.name: qte_skell
options.description: Restores skells automatically if the insurance is still valid

options.name: collection_range
options.description: Increases the collection range of items in the field

options.name: armor_slot_upgrades
options.description: Allows you to further upgrade armor slots.

options.name: armor_traits_upgrades
options.description: Allows you to further upgrade equipment traits. Optional without ressources

options.name: lv_points_modifier
options.description: Modifies the level experience gain and disables 9999 exp cap

options.name: battle_points_modifier
options.description: Modifies the battle experience gain

options.name: blade_points_modifier
options.description: Modifies the BLADE experience gain

options.name: frontier_nav_miranium_frequency
options.description: Alters the frequency of the Frontier-Nav Miranium bonuses

options.name: frontier_nav_miranium_quantity
options.description: Alters the quantity of the Frontier-Nav Miranium bonuses

options.name: frontier_nav_money_frequency
options.description: Alters the frequency of the Frontier-Nav Money bonuses

options.name: frontier_nav_money_quantity
options.description: Alters the quantity of the Frontier-Nav Money bonuses

options.name: frontier_nav_resources_frequency
options.description: Alters the frequency of the Frontier-Nav Resource bonuses

options.name: frontier_nav_resources_quantity
options.description: Alters the quantity of the Frontier-Nav Resource bonuses

options.name: frontier_nav_no_miranium_cap
options.description: Removes the Miranium cap caused by missing storage probes

options.name: equip_alternate_ratio
options.description:
In vanilla, equipment traits have a percent chance to be selected, some of them have 90 or 100%
, while others have 10%. This mod changes that: everything above 80% is capped at 80%
, and everything else is set to 20%

options.name: equip_chest_count
options.description: Alters the guranteed item count in treasure chests

options.name: equip_quality
options.description: Alters the guranteed equipment trait count

options.name: equip_slots
options.description: Alters the guranteed equipment augments slots count

options.name: broken_equip
options.description: Alters chance to get broken equipment

options.name: materials_drop_ratio
options.description: Alters the materials drop ratio

options.name: treasure_quality
options.description: Forces a specific quality

options.name: moon_jump_width
